wiki.summary: “Hotel California” was initially revealed through a Target listing for the Piss In The Wind vinyl. The song would later be confirmed by Joji himself through a tracklist reveal on December 9, 2025. On January 8, 2026, “Hotel California” was previewed by Joji as “Audio 1” on the vault.jojimusic.com website. To listen to the track, fans had to input the code 08209, which consists of the song’s track number and length. Read more on Last.fm.
